claim_boundary: Live model advisory can prioritize and format field measurements only. It cannot verify power, no-short, pinout, current, thermal behavior, splice safety, repair authority, or production release.

measurement_priorities.action: Measure continuity and no-short between all pins and ground
measurement_priorities.why: GPIO header is primary salvage candidate; missing pin continuity and short evidence
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: Continuity map and no-short pass/fail for each pin
measurement_priorities.stop_condition: All 40 pins measured with no short to ground

measurement_priorities.action: Measure voltage on supply pins under current-limited power
measurement_priorities.why: Determine rail voltage and polarity before external connection
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: Voltage reading for each supply pin

measurement_priorities.action: Measure continuity from USB-C VBUS to candidate power rails
measurement_priorities.why: USB-C is likely main power input; need to trace power distribution
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: Continuity between USB-C VBUS and board power rails
measurement_priorities.stop_condition: VBUS continuity confirmed or ruled out

measurement_priorities.action: Measure continuity and no-short on HDMI pins

qwen_evidence_uses.use: Identify pin-1 orientation and likely supply/ground pins from visual inspection
qwen_evidence_uses.limitation: Cannot confirm actual connectivity or voltage without measurement

qwen_evidence_uses.use: Identify USB-C as power input candidate
qwen_evidence_uses.limitation: Cannot confirm VBUS routing or voltage without measurement

qwen_evidence_uses.use: Identify RJ45 connector and pin count
qwen_evidence_uses.limitation: Cannot confirm signal integrity or shielding without measurement

qwen_evidence_uses.use: Identify USB-A port and pin locations
qwen_evidence_uses.limitation: Cannot confirm contact integrity or data line continuity without measurement

qwen_evidence_uses.use: Identify HDMI connector and pin count
qwen_evidence_uses.limitation: Cannot confirm pin mapping or signal presence without measurement

warnings: Do not apply power until ground continuity and no-short are confirmed on all candidate supply pins
GPIO header pin-1 orientation must be verified by visual inspection before measurement
USB-C may have multiple power roles; measure voltage under current limit only
Ethernet transformer may isolate signals; continuity tests may not reflect actual connectivity
HDMI pins are closely spaced; use fine probes to avoid shorts
forbidden_claims: Power rail voltage is within specification

operational_call.summary: Capture measured topology or supply a versioned simulation netlist.
operational_call.why: The module-level test suite exists, but a versioned netlist is required before deterministic simulation.
tools: Qwen vision pass for connector candidates
procedure: Use Qwen/vision to identify candidate connectors, rails, labels, and likely pin groups.
Measure ground continuity and power-to-ground no-short.
Measure rail voltage and polarity under current limit.
Submit topology_evidence.v1 or a versioned netlist and rerun the field operator.
operational_call.on_pass: Compiler should emit a netlist or bounded envelope.
operational_call.on_fail: Continue topology capture; do not power/splice without measured topology.

candidate_actions.summary: Capture measured topology or supply a versioned simulation netlist.
candidate_actions.why: The module-level test suite exists, but a versioned netlist is required before deterministic simulation.
tools: Qwen vision pass for connector candidates
procedure: Use Qwen/vision to identify candidate connectors, rails, labels, and likely pin groups.
Measure ground continuity and power-to-ground no-short.
Measure rail voltage and polarity under current limit.
Submit topology_evidence.v1 or a versioned netlist and rerun the field operator.
candidate_actions.on_pass: Compiler should emit a netlist or bounded envelope.
candidate_actions.on_fail: Continue topology capture; do not power/splice without measured topology.

candidate_actions.summary: Fill the simulation fixture with measured source voltage, source current limit, load current, trace/regulator model, and rail constraints.
Record terminal outcome proof only after simulation and bench evidence agree.

model_assignments.call: extract candidate topology from board and connector photos
model_assignments.authority_boundary: Qwen can propose where to probe; it cannot verify voltage, current, no-short, or safety.

model_assignments.call: prioritize measurements needed to convert candidates into topology evidence
model_assignments.authority_boundary: DeepSeek can structure notes, explain failures, and suggest next measurements; deterministic gates decide trust.

model_assignments.call: rerun topology compiler, power-tree simulation, and design test kit after new evidence
model_assignments.authority_boundary: Only measured evidence plus deterministic gates can advance power/splice/release state.

decision_inputs.release_reason: The module-level test suite exists, but a versioned netlist is required before deterministic simulation.

capture_packet.on_pass: Compiler should emit a netlist or bounded envelope.
capture_packet.on_fail: Continue topology capture; do not power/splice without measured topology.

field_operator.claim_boundary: The field operator can choose photos, measurements, stop calls, and redesign tasks. Qwen/DeepSeek outputs are advisory field observations until measured evidence and deterministic gates confirm them. The field operator cannot independently authorize high-risk power, splice, or production release.
